← RETURN TO TERMINAL

Apple App Store Compliance

Adherence to App Store Review Guidelines as of Q1 2026.

1. User-Generated Content (UGC) GUIDELINE 1.2

Spaceforce Squadron implements a robust automated filtering system for real-time tactical communications.

  • Filtering: Automated profanity and spam blocking via src/compliance/ugc-filter.js.
  • Reporting: Users can mute or report pilots via the internal neural-link (Websim Socket).

2. In-App Purchases & Virtual Currency GUIDELINE 3.1.1

The "Uni" credits utilized within the simulation are strictly virtual assets.

  • No real-world currency can be exchanged for Uni.
  • All asset acquisitions (Ship Hulls, Core Systems) are earned solely through mission completion and gameplay.

3. Privacy & Data Collection GUIDELINE 5.1.1

Data collection is limited to essential gameplay state persistence.

  • Biometrics: FaceID/TouchID is not utilized or requested.
  • Tracking: No third-party tracking or advertising SDKs are present.
  • Encryption: All data transmitted via WebsimSocket is encrypted using standard HTTPS/WSS protocols.

COMPLIANCE_HASH: AAPL-884-SQUAD-2026
SYSTEM_ORIGIN: UTC_CORE_COMPLIANCE
